title: taraxacum arcticum
intro: Taraxacum arcticum, also known as Arctic dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is native to the Arctic regions of North America and is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, offering health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Taraxacum arcticum can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with herbal preparations often using the leaves, flowers, and roots of the plant.
